question: How likely is the farm bill to pass with the save our bacon act provision?
reason: Senate's bipartisan opposition to the Save Our Bacon Act suggests it may be removed from the Farm Bill.
evidence: Senate Democrats and Republicans have expressed concerns over the Save Our Bacon Act.
Senate Agriculture Committee Chairman John Boozman stated he doesn't expect the provision to survive the Senate.
A group of senators, including Cory Booker and Amy Klobuchar, have signaled their unwillingness to vote for any such measures in the Farm Bill.
searchQueries: 2026 Farm Bill Save Our Bacon Act provision status May 2026
